# CashBFF

> CashBFF is a remote MCP (Model Context Protocol) server that connects your bank to Claude through Plaid, so you can ask about your real money in chat. It is OAuth-secured and read-only by default, with 8 read tools and 9 write tools.

CashBFF runs inside Claude on web, desktop, and mobile, across the Free, Pro, and Max plans. You sign up at cashbff.com, link your bank through Plaid, and add CashBFF as a custom connector pointing at https://api.cashbff.com/mcp. Claude handles a one-time OAuth approval and keeps the session for you. CashBFF is built by Daksh Khanna (Khanna's LLC).

## Pages
- [What CashBFF is and how to connect it](https://cashbff.com/mcp): the MCP server, its 17 tools, the safety model, and step-by-step install
- [About CashBFF](https://cashbff.com/about): mission and founder
- [Pricing](https://cashbff.com/pricing): plans and the 14-day free trial
- [Privacy](https://cashbff.com/privacy): privacy policy
- [Terms](https://cashbff.com/terms): terms of service

## Founder
- [Daksh Khanna](https://khannadaksh.com): founder essay, background, and how CashBFF compares to other finance apps
